creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
On 8/14/06, Deb Goodkin wrote:
> Hi Scot,
>
> The FreeBSD Foundation grants you permission to use the FreeBSD Logo on
> the backside of the card image. Please make sure if you are only using
> the daemon, to add a small TM on the upper right side. If you are using
> the daemon with the word FreeBSD, then use the "r in circle", as
> displayed on the project's website.
>
As was requested by the FreeBSD Foundation, I have added the
"registered trademark" symbol to the image.

Please use the image found in the freebsd_deck2.tgz archive.

Scot
-- 
DISCLAIMER:
No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
